name: Franken Polling Team
subject: NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
They tried to stop us. They spent over $8 million. They tried to attack Mike for his military service. They couldn't.
|
---
| |
---

| | Here we go, crew! All your support is paying off. We just saw a poll that has the Admiral statistically tied for the top spot in this race! **They tried to stop us. They spent over $8 million. They tried to attack Mike for his military service. They couldn 't.** The momentum that we've all felt is real, and now we have the numbers to back it up. Iowans are taking notice of our campaign and Mike's vision for Iowa. But we need to keep up the pressure. The next three days are make or break. [_**We 're $73,000 away from our last fundraising goal of the primary. Can you chip in any amount right now? Every penny goes immediately towards our outreach and advertising efforts. No amount is too small, and every contribution is valuable.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2569/33365068/4a7865dc/3f8bcebb/3673874278/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200530_em_fr_poll_all_l1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2569/33365068/4a7865dc/3f8bceb4/3673874278/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200530_em_fr_poll_all_abx5")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Will you please let me explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
This is a long email, but I hope you'll take the time to read it all. In just a minute, I will ask you to make a donation before tomorrow's fundraising deadline. But first, I'd like to give you an explanation.
Washington is broken. And my opponent, Cory Gardner, is one of the biggest reasons why. Time and again, he has voted in lockstep with Mitch McConnell's right-wing agenda. He refuses to stand up to the president, even when it's wrong for his constituents.
**That's why I'm running to replace Gardner with the strong, independent leadership Colorado deserves -- especially during a crisis like this. Because while the masks are new, hard times aren't.** [**So I'm humbly asking, will you join us and donate $3 to help flip this Colorado Senate seat blue?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d7/3454282199/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between John Hickenlooper and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d0/3454282199/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d1/3454282199/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d2/3454282199/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d3/3454282199/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
When I was governor, we brought all sorts of people together and helped Colorado recover from some of the most devastating floods and wildfires in the state's history. We united in the aftermath of one of the country's worst mass shootings. And our economy grew stronger than any other state in the nation.
Mitch McConnell is afraid of our campaign because he knows we would try to put an end to the special interests running rampant in Washington. His allies are dumping nearly $12 million into Colorado to prop up Gardner, attack my character, and distort my record.
I know we have what it takes to win this race and make real change for the people of Colorado -- but only if we have the resources to dispel the GOP's attacks on our campaign. So, I'm turning to you now:
[**I'm personally asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Senator Maggie Hassan's before tomorrow night's fundraising deadline. Without your support, we won't be able to respond to the incoming attacks, and our campaign will be at risk.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d7/3454282199/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
As we begin to pull our country out of this crisis, the American people deserve leaders who will put everyday families, small businesses, and workers first -- not big corporations, their wealthy buddies, or even themselves.
I'm running to be that leader. I'm confident we will win this election and get our country back on track -- but only with your help.
That's why your donation matters so much right now.
Thank you for all you do,
John Hickenlooper
U.S. Senate candidate, Colorado
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097d7/3454282199/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA1MzBfMDUyMk1XSDRKSC1yc19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20200530_0522MWH4JH-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _

To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc47b/2a380d31/23bdd2ea/f097dc/3454282199/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Grace?=
subject: Joe Biden is Not Enough
body:
We need to win Congress and we need YOU to help us. | | | |
---
|
# We need to win back Congress.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=0d6f77a08c&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
###
It's not enough to only win the White House.

We need to get Trump out of the White House, we need a House Majority, and we need a Democratically-controlled Senate to pass legislation to change the lives of working families.

Senator Gillibrand first introduced the FAMILY Act bill in 2013. 7 years have passed and 113 million workers in America are still without any form of paid leave.

7 years have passed and 1 out of 4 women return to work within 2 weeks of giving birth.

Every working person will need time off from work to care for themselves or their family members at some point in their lives and most Americans support paid leave on a federal level.

Caring for a sick family member or a newborn is not a partisan issue, yet Republicans in Congress continue to ignore the needs of working families and block the passage of important legislation such as the FAMILY ACT.

There is so much at stake in November. This is why Moms in Office supports candidates up and down the ballot across the country. Women who will make a real difference when elected, moms who will fight for bills such as paid leave.

Democrats across the country, our organization, and our candidates are relying on your support before tomorrow's fundraising deadline.

Are you with us? Let's win back the presidency. Let's elect changemakers to Congress and let's create the change we need to see in America. [TOGETHER. ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=0deaf7de23&e=3f151f8b74)

Simona Grace,
Founder of Moms in Office PAC
---
|
---
| [Chip in! ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=804ed0fa6c&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in! ")
---
|
---
|
###
We can't do this without you-
“Do you have enough money to buy food for your kids? Do you have enough money to buy gasoline to go to work? Do you have recreation in your town? Do you have health care? It’s about daily lives.”

These were the questions Tatiana Matta asked herself when she decided to ran for Congress and challenge Republican House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy in 2018.

She is a military wife who was born in Puerto Rico, a mom, and an advocate for military families and veterans.

Tatiana was also the co-chair of the veterans and military families committee for former Maryland Gov. Martin O’Malley during his presidential campaign run in 2016.

She had the courage to stand up for her community and challenge Trump's closest ally and now we have her on our team to help us elect well qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know what working families are up against each day.

We can't let big dark money scare us, drown out the truth, and drown our voices.

[We need your help](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=bc33b291f3&e=3f151f8b74) so we can continue to support our candidates' fight against dark money Republicans like Kevin McCarthy.

Every single contribution of any size is a sign that we are still in this fight to make America work for all of us, not just the top 5%.

---
|
---

name: Lara Trump
subject: Please join me in supporting Bill Hagerty
body:
Bill has stood with President Trump and now we're standing with him
Peter,Bill Hagerty stood with President Trump, serving as our Tennessee Victory Chair, as a senior leader on the Trump transition team, and as Ambassador to Japan.**Now I'm proud to stand with him.** Bill has a critical fundraising deadline at the end of this month. Will you join me in supporting Bill's campaign for U.S. Senate by [**donating right now?**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-y/) [JOIN LARA TRUMP - DONATE TO BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-j/) President Trump needs conservative fighters like Bill in the Senate to support our MAGA agenda. Please join me and support Bill [**by making a donation right now. **](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-t/)Thank you for your time.Lara Trump | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pntrid-fuutjhhtj-o/)

Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike

| | Friend-

TODAY is our end of the month deadline and President Trump is reviewing our list of donors after midnight.

Will your name be on the list?

[We are $14,657 short of our May goal President Trump set for us. Add your name to our donor list by chipping in TODAY:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=168A234A1A3009)

| | During my time in the Assembly, I’ve:

✔ Proudly voted against tax increases 336 times;

✔ Successfully led the effort to block legislation allowing illegal immigrants to register to vote;

✔ Fought against the disastrous bail reform and achieved fixes to add serious crimes back to the list of "qualifying offenses" that are eligible for bail;

✔ Been a leading advocate for improved public transportation on Staten Island and in southern Brooklyn;

✔ Led the effort to secure $151 million in state funding for the East Shore Sea Wall.

I want to keep fighting for you in Congress where I will have a better platform to hold Governor Cuomo and Mayor de Blasio accountable and push back on AOC and the Socialist Squad.

name: Margaret Good
subject: the challenges of 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
I knew running for Congress would be hard work, but rewarding, however, I had no idea we would face these unprecedented times or that we would be re-writing the playbook on how to campaign in 2020.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17695470/203218062/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGEyNmYzMy00NmEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wkg_UKBaMNp9UhpqBcXqHgTnyuUkVRhD1-SkHd6t5I=&emci=b096ebb9-eda0-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=d8a26f33-46a3-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

I knew running for Congress would be hard work, but rewarding, however, I had no idea we would face these unprecedented times or that we would be re-writing the playbook on how to campaign in 2020. But, I knew that no matter what we faced, we would rise to the occasion.

I was confident we would rise to the occasion because of our incredible supporters — like you — who step up time and again. Now, when we hold a Zoom event, have a deadline to meet, or simply need your support getting the word out about our campaign on social media, you all are there. Thank you.

At midnight tonight, we’ll close the books on May and head into the most critical end-of-quarter deadline our campaign has faced.

**[Finishing the month strong is critical to keeping up our momentum — can you make a contribution before midnight to ensure we enter June in the strongest position possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17695471/203218063/788213855?refcode=em05312020AM&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGEyNmYzMy00NmEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wkg_UKBaMNp9UhpqBcXqHgTnyuUkVRhD1-SkHd6t5I=)**

The past few months have made it clear we need bold new leadership that is willing to fight for everyone, not just a select few, in Congress.

The movement we’re building is going up against the national GOP and special interest groups. That never scared me before, in fact, it motivates me, and I know it motivates you all, too. Thanks for being with me in this fight.

**[Please, help me finish May strong with a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17695472/203218064/788213855?refcode=em05312020AM&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGEyNmYzMy00NmEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wkg_UKBaMNp9UhpqBcXqHgTnyuUkVRhD1-SkHd6t5I=)**

Thank you,
Margaret | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17695473/203218065/788213855?refcode=em05312020AM&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGEyNmYzMy00NmEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Wkg_UKBaMNp9UhpqBcXqHgTnyuUkVRhD1-SkHd6t5I=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. clean_body: I knew running for Congress would be hard work, but rewarding, however, I had no idea we would face these unprecedented times or that we would be re-writing the playbook on how to campaign in 2020. Hi there, I knew running for Congress would be hard work, but rewarding, however, I had no idea we would face these unprecedented times or that we would be re-writing the playbook on how to campaign in 2020. But, I knew that no matter what we faced, we would rise to the occasion. I was confident we would rise to the occasion because of our incredible supporters — like you — who step up time and again. Now, when we hold a Zoom event, have a deadline to meet, or simply need your support getting the word out about our campaign on social media, you all are there. Thank you. At midnight tonight, we’ll close the books on May and head into the most critical end-of-quarter deadline our campaign has faced. = The past few months have made it clear we need bold new leadership that is willing to fight for everyone, not just a select few, in Congress. The movement we’re building is going up against the national GOP and special interest groups. That never scared me before, in fact, it motivates me, and I know it motivates you all, too. Thanks for being with me in this fight. = Thank you, Margaret | = | Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States

---
Dear Friend, To say that I am heartbroken over the death of George Floyd, the civil unrest that has followed, the loss of over 100,000 of our fellow Americans to COVID-19 - with no end in sight - the economic devastation of 40 million unemployed, the divisive and dysfunctional nature of Congress, and the absolute vacuum of leadership from the executive branch, doesn't even begin to describe the complexity of my emotions. But I will tell you one emotion that is growing exponentially - determination. I can understand why millions of people voted for Mr. Trump in 2016 and for his enablers in Congress. I'm not blind to the policy failures of both parties that led to the enormous dissatisfaction and distrust of government. What I can't understand is why anyone, given what has happened to our country in the last three and a half years, would vote to perpetuate the current state of affairs. A friend of mine posted something profound, and possibly prophetic on Facebook: _"2020 will go down in history as the year that broke the United States or healed the United States. The choice is ours."_ I'm determined to choose the latter. I hope you are too. **[Demand Better by pitching in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17696313/203226720/-1907457919?refcode=053120_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNjYTJjMi00OGEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_UoC89IfuQC-D9iZZcJsaZK-czDk3DCR7mc7r7WzykU=)**. Determination alone won't get this done. name: Steph Houghton, Team Michelle
subject: We need to keep our momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
We've had an exciting month, but if we're going to keep building on our momentum we can't afford to fall short of our goal.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

I wanted to give you a quick update about our end-of-month progress, friend.

"China has total control over the World Health Organization," the president said. For that reason, **the US "will be today terminating our relationship with the World Health Organization."**

**What is clear is the president’s decision will be a major blow to the WHO.** America’s withdrawal means the health body will lose nearly $900 million in US contributions every two years, by far the most the body receives from any nation...

**In one fell swoop, Trump is making the global coronavirus response harder to coordinate,** has possibly ignited a congressional firestorm, and almost surely worsened the world’s perceptions of America.

body:
Even though Democrats have done well in recent elections, Virginia is still a battleground state. And Republicans are determined to take it back this year.
|
---
| | Breaking: _Real Clear Politics_ lists Virginia as a
"toss up" **[Donate to keep Virginia blue](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d47b/53d9897e/548f34ac/1c887a04/2900388445/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-blue2020?refcode=20200531_f_1_nd__596__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")** Derek --

**It 's official: Right now, Virginia is a "toss up" for the 2020 presidential election.** There's still time to change that outcome. Team Warner is working hard to put Virginia squarely back in Democratic territory, but we need your help.

Even though Democrats have done well in recent elections, Virginia is still a battleground state. And Republicans are determined to take it back this year. The Trump Victory Initiative is pouring money into the Commonwealth and organized over 90 events across Virginia last year, and Mark Warner is facing three Republican challengers trying to take his seat in the Senate. **This "toss up" designation shows that the GOP could be gaining ground.**

**[If you have the means, will you consider chipping in to help us keep Virginia blue?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d47b/53d9897e/548f34ac/1c887a03/2900388445/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-blue2020?refcode=20200531_f_1_nd__596__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d47b/53d9897e/548f34ac/1c887a02/2900388445/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-blue2020?refcode=20200531_f_1_nd__596__&refcode2=img&amount=5")
---
**What 's more, the Biden campaign has named Virginia as one of five states Democrats MUST win again this year to win the presidency.** Without Virginia in the Democratic column, the path to the White House is virtually impossible. Here on Team Warner, we're fighting for more than just Mark's re-election -- we're doing everything we can to keep Virginia blue across the ballot.

**[Will you chip in today and help us keep Virginia blue?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d47b/53d9897e/548f34ac/1c887a01/2900388445/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-blue2020?refcode=20200531_f_1_nd__596__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

Thank you so much,

Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d47b/53d9897e/548f34ac/1c887a00/2900388445/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-blue2020?refcode=20200531_f_1_nd__596__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

---
The experts and the press are starting to realize what we've known all along, Peter: **If MJ is the candidate to take on Sen. Cornyn after the runoff, we can beat him and flip the Senate on Election Day!**

But we're going to need your help to do it. **[All donations toward our end-of-month goal are currently being MATCHED, so pitch in before tonight's midnight deadline to help us reach our goal!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003a/7f51f7bc/4e2e23ad/4ef69851/1668374051/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endofmonth-match?refcode=email_20200531.1nd__1487__&amount=10")**

Thanks to our team of over 42,000 donors who chip in an average online donation of $23 at a time, we've built this campaign into a force to be reckoned with -- and Sen. Cornyn's special interest allies are taking note.

They're TERRIFIED that they could lose Mitch McConnell's right hand man this November -- and control of the Senate along with it. That's why **the Koch network is planning to spend _unprecedented sums in Texas_** to defend Sen. Cornyn.

The good news is we can beat their big money with a Texas-sized grassroots movement -- but your help is going to be crucial. **So if you can, please make a MATCHED donation before tonight 's midnight deadline to help us reach our end-of-month goal!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003a/7f51f7bc/4e2e23ad/4ef69851/1668374051/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-endofmonth-match?refcode=email_20200531.1nd__1487__&amount=10")**

name: Democratic Senate
subject: Mitch McConnell is SCRAMBLING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If we lose, McConnell gets two more years.
| | |
---
**_THE WASHINGTON POST:_ A DEMOCRATIC WIN IN GEORGIA KEY TO ENDING MCCONNELL'S SENATE MAJORITY**
Friend: Right now, polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) TIED - in a race that analysts at _The Washington Post_ say is key to deciding Senate control!
That's why a GOP super PAC has set its sights on Georgia as a TOP target, and why McConnell is lining up the FULL backing of the Republican establishment to support his handpicked candidate. Simply put, Mitch McConnell is SCRAMBLING.
We have a historic opportunity to elect Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first black senator, flip this seat and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all - but Loeffler is flooding this race with $20 MILLION of her own fortune, and we need your immediate grassroots support to fight back.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win in Georgia and take back the Senate, but we can't do it alone. And with just HOURS left until our critical match opportunity expires, we're still falling $8,291 short of our goal. **

body:

| Dear Patriot,
This is our 8th and final installment of the Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
I hope by now, you have seen the way Lisa Scheller says one thing and acts the complete opposite way.
Whether it is raising taxes or voting to make Lehigh County a Sanctuary City or answering Gunther's questions about China, Lisa Scheller refuses to give a straight answer and tell the truth. This is why I am urging you to donate to my campaign today!
We cannot let another Establishment RINO get elected to office.
A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 will help defeat Lisa Scheller's expensive D.C. consultants.

name: Michelle Steel
subject: This is your last chance -- can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
We have less than 24 hours until our critical campaign deadline and right now we're behind where we need to be to keep up with the Radical Left.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013KDJscu9eRq2Re6fnWk77HlxUhlwhugjiDuAemjFiMzWQjfTkIf0OjeP76mMJrv2s9sn0-cl9qdBmpp5xawNqt0W9mnt5vaddtcqANATXlTyIqhZiuCdUiZ4HKHk10REtoaxaiaQqKr6q0on76N7bF7we1n0Q40x-Fm1Ffm1Q_tLLW28SDhGU2DKJKgvlH329INHeXis7RPiaJUWF9JVaYlOO7RLLOF_BXNKgtnjLIzX5UF6zaqvdq6RCG_WuZ3aEu8KjuKHxCE-OR7VQbjKs_rHphE_4hemTCQsOUVJ256uf8_oxGJKJZKI5QgibWOuwnHS-pvm0Ez46iunOFQkuEKajE9o6Oo5V8ocUvhE1JCgyZtAdVDgOQ==&c=yeJJuv7EgWSbyCm4615aDUu3r8Wro0QusGWEjzqD0oVMVdMGPtQtmA==&ch=n3rDPEfIOA20TWpFnaDeaFnCDT60wkFB9_U4FeGEPzHKfp4OqBdIEA==) Friend,

**We only have until midnight to hit our fundraising goal and right now we 're behind where we need to be.** If just 209 grassroots supporters gave only $10 we'd get back on track. Your contribution could be the one to get us over the finish line. As one of seven top-targeted races and a virtual toss-up, we're going to need all the help we can get. [**Can I count on you to be one of them?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013KDJscu9eRq2Re6fnWk77HlxUhlwhugjiDuAemjFiMzWQjfTkIf0OsfZgOpooZrao9v4aNfp0Ls-O09EXDdFhYc6V5kGHEjMSx_Lvwh6KDtei561Tr7GTcCvJABdMqP2O57LFYtGljmMFbL_OxDLla8aJ0Z3oNZgztRFwo92wz3Txhbb5yZeGembCMqrZw_zfD3HK0-wI8_7KViD8cqqTo27j6t0heY6RDG2RiUE22EF5ccFo1ojiSuxJAJS7OYlUz3IcDXoBUg9ruhLtV5sw3Gxo73uUGxqRhmmnP3QhE5-3loLs0sEjYQoyW2KXyVRm5qDoYJSr-TBWVsT6PyGCXDv18tbNRNDptr7RoDjtWG3zL5hhPmHqw==&c=yeJJuv7EgWSbyCm4615aDUu3r8Wro0QusGWEjzqD0oVMVdMGPtQtmA==&ch=n3rDPEfIOA20TWpFnaDeaFnCDT60wkFB9_U4FeGEPzHKfp4OqBdIEA==)

If you're able, make a $10 donation here before midnight tonight: [**https://secure.winred.com/michellesteel/critical-may-deadline**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013KDJscu9eRq2Re6fnWk77HlxUhlwhugjiDuAemjFiMzWQjfTkIf0OsfZgOpooZrao9v4aNfp0Ls-O09EXDdFhYc6V5kGHEjMSx_Lvwh6KDtei561Tr7GTcCvJABdMqP2O57LFYtGljmMFbL_OxDLla8aJ0Z3oNZgztRFwo92wz3Txhbb5yZeGembCMqrZw_zfD3HK0-wI8_7KViD8cqqTo27j6t0heY6RDG2RiUE22EF5ccFo1ojiSuxJAJS7OYlUz3IcDXoBUg9ruhLtV5sw3Gxo73uUGxqRhmmnP3QhE5-3loLs0sEjYQoyW2KXyVRm5qDoYJSr-TBWVsT6PyGCXDv18tbNRNDptr7RoDjtWG3zL5hhPmHqw==&c=yeJJuv7EgWSbyCm4615aDUu3r8Wro0QusGWEjzqD0oVMVdMGPtQtmA==&ch=n3rDPEfIOA20TWpFnaDeaFnCDT60wkFB9_U4FeGEPzHKfp4OqBdIEA==)

**And remember, 4X match is active but only until midnight tonight!** If you've ever wanted to make a direct and immediate impact on the future of our county, don't miss this opportunity to have 4X the impact.

Your support is critical as we inch closer to election day. We're facing one of the toughest races in the nation, and this month was the hardest one yet. After our opponent outraised us by nearly double, Pelosi's PAC announced over $3 million in ads to be used against us. If we don't reach our goal, we won't be able to compete and will lose any chance of reclaiming the House Majority.

So please, If you're able, make a $10 donation before midnight tonight: [**https://secure.winred.com/michellesteel/critical-may-deadline**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013KDJscu9eRq2Re6fnWk77HlxUhlwhugjiDuAemjFiMzWQjfTkIf0OsfZgOpooZrao9v4aNfp0Ls-O09EXDdFhYc6V5kGHEjMSx_Lvwh6KDtei561Tr7GTcCvJABdMqP2O57LFYtGljmMFbL_OxDLla8aJ0Z3oNZgztRFwo92wz3Txhbb5yZeGembCMqrZw_zfD3HK0-wI8_7KViD8cqqTo27j6t0heY6RDG2RiUE22EF5ccFo1ojiSuxJAJS7OYlUz3IcDXoBUg9ruhLtV5sw3Gxo73uUGxqRhmmnP3QhE5-3loLs0sEjYQoyW2KXyVRm5qDoYJSr-TBWVsT6PyGCXDv18tbNRNDptr7RoDjtWG3zL5hhPmHqw==&c=yeJJuv7EgWSbyCm4615aDUu3r8Wro0QusGWEjzqD0oVMVdMGPtQtmA==&ch=n3rDPEfIOA20TWpFnaDeaFnCDT60wkFB9_U4FeGEPzHKfp4OqBdIEA==)

Because this seat will determine whether we're faced with two more years of Pelosi's leftist agenda or a return to common-sense, conservative reform. I promise to fight for lower taxes, a pro-business environment, affordable healthcare, and an end to the Democrats socialist priorities in Congress -- but I can't get there alone.

[**Can I count on your support to help take back this seat, this state, and the House from the Democrats?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013KDJscu9eRq2Re6fnWk77HlxUhlwhugjiDuAemjFiMzWQjfTkIf0OjeP76mMJrv2s9sn0-cl9qdBmpp5xawNqt0W9mnt5vaddtcqANATXlTyIqhZiuCdUiZ4HKHk10REtoaxaiaQqKr6q0on76N7bF7we1n0Q40x-Fm1Ffm1Q_tLLW28SDhGU2DKJKgvlH329INHeXis7RPiaJUWF9JVaYlOO7RLLOF_BXNKgtnjLIzX5UF6zaqvdq6RCG_WuZ3aEu8KjuKHxCE-OR7VQbjKs_rHphE_4hemTCQsOUVJ256uf8_oxGJKJZKI5QgibWOuwnHS-pvm0Ez46iunOFQkuEKajE9o6Oo5V8ocUvhE1JCgyZtAdVDgOQ==&c=yeJJuv7EgWSbyCm4615aDUu3r8Wro0QusGWEjzqD0oVMVdMGPtQtmA==&ch=n3rDPEfIOA20TWpFnaDeaFnCDT60wkFB9_U4FeGEPzHKfp4OqBdIEA==) This seat was flipped blue for the first time ever in 2018 and if we fall short now it could be gone for good.

Right now our opponent is running scared and attacking us every chance he gets, because he knows we have the grassroots support of conservatives like you behind us.

**4X match is live until midnight tonight, but please don 't wait to join our fight. **

Thank you for continued support,

Michelle Steel

The situation regarding Colorado's Senate race is serious. == Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating. And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue. Friend, The above headlines aren't exaggerating. The situation regarding Colorado's Senate race is serious. Democrats are gaining momentum in the race for the Senate Majority. Big money liberal donors are lining up to influence and target battleground states, including Colorado. And now, Colorado was named the race to determine control of the Senate this year, and the Left has found its opening to take it. We have to stand up for what's working for America and what's helping Coloradans the most right now: strong, principled, and common-sense leadership from Cory Gardner. name: Joni Ernst
subject: We need just 18 more donors to hit our goal before midnight, can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
My finance team just sent me a quick update on tonight's deadline. We only need 18 more donors before midnight tonight to meet our goal.
Hey Friend,

My finance team just sent me a quick update on tonight's deadline. We only need 18 more donors before midnight tonight to meet our goal.

Can you help? [**If so, click here to donate any amount.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012qoKf2gEQOaEXuX0rhwpZDLkTNokMTQsxRzGf8VUdK_TsAIgjRy5FUOGr0BSIhnWyFB5ZnYDcWYPZ5ivRTjx7Og4sEHJZPDmKWU0IuOras_yh_BwGdGF6DhktfoZioalbzvmERk7H_hH0lTQz9bMTS96H8zFsfGNpeTssd56NCe_aKQp_hpiyET41w7IhCTBbEzintyIGqylGChglk_9Jk2RW0pawD1gncwoBBEcPSyhZpYVb0A9UTr-p8xhJ86VKv_oeQExgM3cm8l1urqVd0VAD60dTzk13WEjCBwUfMsy4P795biy1tZE2V73VsBpss9QlnhW1pSo8OJci-59hgAY3LaH0tgY&c=l7_1H6gnXbDnGsdVI03b_QD-NLgYM1cYWaQ6Q3b3bDiyML-3UZOR_Q==&ch=XpVhUvNhzkUqxN-Hd8c-Zdp552-ypTVqpEsjELNFHUOSShb56_5cjw==)

This is the LAST deadline before Democrats take to the polls on Tuesday - that means Democrats are pouring millions into Iowa to flip this Senate seat and elect their far-Left candidate.

We've made it this far, Friend, now, we can't afford to come up short.

Chuck Schumer is working overtime to support his handpicked candidate in Iowa, and I need your help if we're going to fight back.

Will you be one of the 18?

[**Donate HERE.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012qoKf2gEQOaEXuX0rhwpZDLkTNokMTQsxRzGf8VUdK_TsAIgjRy5FUOGr0BSIhnWyFB5ZnYDcWYPZ5ivRTjx7Og4sEHJZPDmKWU0IuOras_yh_BwGdGF6DhktfoZioalbzvmERk7H_hH0lTQz9bMTS96H8zFsfGNpeTssd56NCe_aKQp_hpiyET41w7IhCTBbEzintyIGqylGChglk_9Jk2RW0pawD1gncwoBBEcPSyhZpYVb0A9UTr-p8xhJ86VKv_oeQExgM3cm8l1urqVd0VAD60dTzk13WEjCBwUfMsy4P795biy1tZE2V73VsBpss9QlnhW1pSo8OJci-59hgAY3LaH0tgY&c=l7_1H6gnXbDnGsdVI03b_QD-NLgYM1cYWaQ6Q3b3bDiyML-3UZOR_Q==&ch=XpVhUvNhzkUqxN-Hd8c-Zdp552-ypTVqpEsjELNFHUOSShb56_5cjw==)

Joni Ernst

body:
Last week, I proudly endorsed Mondaire, because I know that now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington like Mondaire | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JQE/ni0YAA/t.328/5K-ocg-lQtqmY6wEaublbw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvDS3giY5aYsXcmThBb9klRcAUK0yPxlwnwcVPysbm77U62VIpF53bJHhQungFHUZyr2Lk88kBhzMKpdfYERREXivDC4xpjROVB9ceFm-2FZlwQzLnPDohD17YbpHz-2Fd5SAgQTwnAPKC0FLwr9fjZnpfv-2BvxC8G3bFVEBXWjBTqcy-2FYVWKqsmnI-2FVbSMEX-2BmtOuzgooy5K1xOwUNW7UHXBqT6CRU8bAY5rv2s4BUpcvMeHe2hJpEXmwtceHwYMF4IQplaRuuYSAEpeWYd3y9bDxRngyu-2FMsYkg1DUUtPf578OA-3D-3D/ba1q) Friend, Last week, I proudly endorsed Mondaire, because I know that now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington like Mondaire who understand the challenges that hardworking families face every day.
Mondaire is truly running a people-first campaign. He’s centering vulnerable and marginalized communities, listening to people who have been left out of the political process, and refusing to accept donations from corporate PACs.
But running a people-first campaign isn’t easy. Mondaire’s campaign isn’t powered by corporate PACs, big donors, or special interests--it’s powered by people like you.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Mondaire’s campaign. Today is the last day of the month, and it’s one of the last fundraising deadlines of his campaign. Right now, he’s still $6,355 away from hitting his goal. **_[Can you make a contribution today to help him get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JQE/ni0YAA/t.328/5K-ocg-lQtqmY6wEaublbw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvDS3giY5aYsXcmThBb9klRcAUK0yPxlwnwcVPysbm73omp8n4ZaCkfiZXEeTjSDYaUjjTnNpt3qTyVHwDtFOlqXTu1P7jPWq926QznRLB1NUoNLCXJt-2F52L85iDLg7kI1-2FVA6E7n7QsZH2q12Gpi7UgruxPy683l7SVIFli2c9T1rE240l5fFx6GePy6btDL9EOkApZ0KC-2Bs0qFBpJpeMSisSYhRjkHCckUHjv26Dl0XZzDUaMp7rDrTp2pOgDfT065QNnkdlNRTvKCPnyH1mJxO344q8w6m4X4uVkmTSIQ-3D-3D/0dkX)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/JQE/ni0YAA/t.328/5K-ocg-lQtqmY6wEaublbw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvDS3giY5aYsXcmThBb9klRcAUK0yPxlwnwcVPysbm74FVU2WMBQPeiHG-2B-2BqT0zcPboEJNu7H9pYHeT4VcNj8mVJYRzjvJt3eYQDim0ek864y9fnOo-2BA3YMTwD4lC-2Ft3X5t7cqYrPxqAvumoc0wIO7CaBGK2t6gzYxz-2Fzum53gCdI1dOArn4EWB3QayJRQLdJJ5yTJGsHIxf51iuBPDnkGBmr2tO3NpleD8VyM2T1nOmfcRRKjZmTT9gWYtuXSfI3mbU-2FIPQXLLjIm1dTd1-2BCeOEBCDEj3yLiLvQqWi17DfQ-3D-3D/xm5X)

clean_body: Last week, I proudly endorsed Mondaire, because I know that now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington like Mondaire | | | Friend, Last week, I proudly endorsed Mondaire, because I know that now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington like Mondaire who understand the challenges that hardworking families face every day. Mondaire is truly running a people-first campaign. He’s centering vulnerable and marginalized communities, listening to people who have been left out of the political process, and refusing to accept donations from corporate PACs. But running a people-first campaign isn’t easy. Mondaire’s campaign isn’t powered by corporate PACs, big donors, or special interests--it’s powered by people like you. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Mondaire’s campaign. Today is the last day of the month, and it’s one of the last fundraising deadlines of his campaign. Right now, he’s still $6,355 away from hitting his goal. Mondaire has the experience, vision, and grit to fight for a people-first agenda in Washington, and I’m proud to lend my support to his campaign. Together, we can change the face of Washington, and elect leaders like Mondaire who are fighting for the important issues. I hope I can count on you. Thank you, Julián Castro | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . clean_body: Our team is still behind far left Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer's quarterly fundraising total with just a few hours from the last key fundraising deadline before Tuesday's primary! Deadline tonight: Ashley needs your help today! Friend, Our team is still behind far left Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer's quarterly fundraising total with just a few hours from the last key fundraising deadline before Tuesday's primary! We need your help before today ends. We must ensure that Ashley Hinson can catch up as soon as possible. == Reaching our fundraising goal is the only way we can pull ahead of Congresswoman Finkenauer and win in November. Ashley is a proven leader in Iowa. As a state legislator, she has fought to cut taxes, fund our schools, and support veterans across her district. These are exactly the type of common sense policies that are needed in Congress right now! Ashley's record as a legislator and as an award-winning news reporter shows that she can get the job done for this community. ==, and don't forget to vote for her on June 2nd if you live in this district! == == == == == == Thank you, Team Hinson == PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: John Jackson
subject: FW: have you done all you can?
body:
Friend, I promise this is the last email you'll receive about our End of Month deadline.
But I wanted to make sure you saw Senator Cornyn's question.
He asked... Once we move on to June and we either hit or miss our goal, will you be able to say you did everything you can to keep Texas red?
**[Well, Friend, have you?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlMbOzJRrIGQdoMWALHKVIF6R9vmzw2u7f5AeF2H19kMc7a4SNqRlDpfojIlWlPnmVmZYwRClfzYziwdRxFBrOAUx_teP3oyFxClSZfZAie5hUjqF9a5LTQvERbH-ZAig_my-_H4yXXiO8W9TYvdQgR2pi6gpSmVeeEcxmEMbOndYYT-FWp8RT6qAN-ADHtfk8ZBtYHBTVCFOVDGbIxkwfzpHBr2WX-E0kmZx7jKgIJbOBFGbsD1BzA1gO5Txx4I7dJvLGlWd8yKG42b6kLPhfq076vdZkv5SXQ==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==)**
Right now, with just a few HOURS remaining, we're $4,500 short of our goal. Without you taking action, we're on track to come up short for the first time ever.
**[I really don't want to tell Senator Cornyn that we missed the goal especially when there is a 3X MATCH active...](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlMbOzJRrIGQdoMWALHKVIF6R9vmzw2u7f5AeF2H19kMc7a4SNqRlDpfojIlWlPnmVmZYwRClfzYziwdRxFBrOAUx_teP3oyFxClSZfZAie5hUjqF9a5LTQvERbH-ZAig_my-_H4yXXiO8W9TYvdQgR2pi6gpSmVeeEcxmEMbOndYYT-FWp8RT6qAN-ADHtfk8ZBtYHBTVCFOVDGbIxkwfzpHBr2WX-E0kmZx7jKgIJbOBFGbsD1BzA1gO5Txx4I7dJvLGlWd8yKG42b6kLPhfq3WbzDW-QfLjA==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==)**
Will you do your part by chipping in immediately?
This is our last chance. \-------Forwarded Message Below------ Friend, Before we know it, the clock will strike zero. Our May fundraising deadline will pass.
As soon as our numbers are final, Democrats here in Texas and around the country will begin to circle like sharks.
They'll be looking for any sign of weakness.
And if they find it, they will immediately begin their attack.
We can't give them any fuel to fire up their efforts to flip Texas blue.
**[As we stand right now, we need 300 additional Texans to step up and chip in if we stand any chance.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlMbOzJRrIGQdoMWALHKVIF6R9vmzw2u7f5AeF2H19kMc7a4SNqRlDpfojIlWlPnmVmZYwRClfzYziwdRxFBrOAUx_teP3oyFxClSZfZAie5hUjqF9a5LTQvERbH-ZAig_my-_H4yXXiO8W9TYvdQgR2pi6gpSmVeeEcxmEMbOndYYT-FWp8RT6qAN-ADHtfk8ZBtYHBTVCFOVDGbIxkwfzpHBr2WX-E0kmZx7jKgIJbOBFGbsD1BzA1gO5Txx4I7dJvLGlWd8yKG42b6kLPhfq3NQU7ryMgfJA==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==) **
Friend, I need one of those people to be you. _**May Fundraising Deadline**_ Goal: **SHORT** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlMbOzJRrIGQdoMWALHKVIF6R9vmzw2u7f5AeF2H19kMc7a4SNqRlDpfojIlWlPnmVmZYwRClfzYziwdRxFBrOAUx_teP3oyFxClSZfZAie5hUjqF9a5LTQvERbH-ZAig_my-_H4yXXiO8W9TYvdQgR2pi6gpSmVeeEcxmEMbOndYYT-FWp8RT6qAN-ADHtfk8ZBtYHBTVCFOVDGbIxkwfzpHBr2WX-E0kmZx7jKgIJbOBFGbsD1BzA1gO5Txx4I7dJvLGlWd8yKG42b6kLPhfq0C6_4MYmauwQ==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==) Once we move on to June and we either hit or miss our goal, I want you to ask yourself one question.
**[Did you do everything you can to keep Texas red?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlMbOzJRrIGQdoMWALHKVIF6R9vmzw2u7f5AeF2H19kMc7a4SNqRlDpfojIlWlPnmVmZYwRClfzYziwdRxFBrOAUx_teP3oyFxClSZfZAie5hUjqF9a5LTQvERbH-ZAig_my-_H4yXXiO8W9TYvdQgR2pi6gpSmVeeEcxmEMbOndYYT-FWp8RT6qAN-ADHtfk8ZBtYHBTVCFOVDGbIxkwfzpHBr2WX-E0kmZx7jKgIJbOBFGbsD1BzA1gO5Txx4I7dJvLGlWd8yKG42b6kLPhfq0uCEQwncajqw==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==)**
Did you do everything you can to keep our great state out of the hands of left-wing radicals?
If the answer is no, your time is now.
\- John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlI7iqy7chEC2EQoQQNcxtYCphVCXc-7w67m0AKHqfrddiOZutl3JRQAO8xkGyvvVDUOxWjdzwRQL8zfYd2AInNegTlMceHLUsp2ogQ71xQSpCeFLDxMQ_cg=&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlJKsaKhLstS6GYPrehyWypDbDvY4Hs1ABrHos0DtPe4N4K6JsXK9N6A77WUaO2fVbwfmSCPzYY7HXgVKoizzkK_NBIx0XYWXuVov6rEIekq_&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlI7iqy7chEC25s1HnhxHxJkB5PN896dB4GPi8In-3nYqBNT3bAQFr70-DEtWfSjIRaqXW6nkOCwEbcKNB1Syd0JGR7c4V6rX8DzfCSWrC9Vi0mElF6yZDuQyfR79jCtgww==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018ymSXMkdWLZMuYGxAum2cx2CaupRamqaa-7MaY-PunDvbsxAN84RlD2rGShlNtlHYWtN4ocTff4yFkkiAe-MxzCFbOHqUvqqoMPOLk6jZjgzBg0ZwYEeTZTtRRA_qYPo39tOUrL799aW0AVkmgdqLWX09BEzFTsX2A0lzOjfQ5yzgMJNFOnDvv4iJvA2P69_ulAOpH6N7z7RgEE97ZhWy3ni6Ktk-hyUQNmQSv4wYM4eA_-ZLN79pqXK37qeNFUJ689OQAhhkrj0kB3HALP6e3vNQ0zultoQmLwi2Gn7PA3AQuYoMmW71A==&c=WQcWjsbugnuvBB3POe-A5JDV7vuFVgSu2y5ZkLRDY9ba8qcvos_grg==&ch=LJ1BdqgNUURL8HBqaSmXatM6rXR0-HUDWqb96OLz2fDRFXYwZ0kz7A==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

May Fundraising Deadline Goal: SHORT == Once we move on to June and we either hit or miss our goal, I want you to ask yourself one question. == Did you do everything you can to keep our great state out of the hands of left-wing radicals? If the answer is no, your time is now. \- John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on == and == that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn == up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our == and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible. | | Texans for Senator John Cornyn | PO BOX 13026, Austin, TX 78711 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

subject: Reaching out for an urgent matter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Our April reporting deadline is TOMORROW. It is essential that we take action NOW, and respond strongly to the Democrats' fundraising machine. The radical Left has mobilized their fundraising efforts nationwide, and now, we need your support tonight so that Senate Republican Leader Todd Young (R-IN) can continue his mission of defending the Senate this year.
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs **YOU** to help him in this fight. _
---

Friend, you've seen the headlines and the recent polling out of battleground states ahead of this year's elections and to be frank, what the political pundits are saying isn't that far off from reality this time.

**Joe Biden is gaining rapid momentum in several key states around the country. And, Chuck Schumer 's handpicked candidates in Colorado, Maine, Arizona, and Iowa to name a few are also beginning to surge.**

_To combat the onslaught of radical left-wing candidates seeking to take down President Trump and the entire Republican Senate Majority this year, Todd Young (R-IN) was tasked with leading a coalition of Republicans to defend these battleground states and their Republican Senators._

Todd's mission is simple: to aid fellow Republicans in any way possible, helping to spread the message of conservative values and the pro-growth, America-First policies that are getting our country back on the right track. _**But with Todd 's May Fundraising Deadline rapidly approaching tonight, he's still $3,223 short of reaching his monthly goal to continue in this mission.**_

subject: Justice for George Floyd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pkfAbk2LZmp_KcevYbco-8nWM8yK3QjrkbDtw4pUDHo=/lp7BFp2yvxnkR_ukn77jlCZ9O42n9Amwa5evb6z-K0w=?refcode=justiceforgeorgefloyd)
---
| Peter, George Floyd died on the ground, his hands cuffed behind his back, and a sworn officer's knee on his neck. We have all seen the video of him saying "I can't breathe" and pleading for them to stop, as his life left his body. The individuals responsible for George Floyd's death must be held accountable, and we must all condemn the deaths and murders that have - for generations - stolen the lives of parents, brothers, children, and loved ones, but that's not enough. As a nation, we must directly confront the bias, hate, and structures that lay the foundation of disparity in our communities, our schools, and our healthcare and justice systems. George Floyd cannot simply be one more name in a cycle of violence that takes the lives of our fellow Americans and weakens us as a nation and a people. Amid the anguish felt across our country, if you are looking for ways to take action, please _**[consider supporting the NAACP](https://act.myngp.com/el/pkfAbk2LZmp_KcevYbco-8nWM8yK3QjrkbDtw4pUDHo=/uDyXJYE9YmP2uIGGj-ESSiJOjxor6kGYwwSOhVaFgNk=)**_ and its #WeAreDoneDying campaign.
---
Thank you,

_Abigail _

subject: A clear path to flipping the White House and Senate

body:
The 2020 elections will likely be the most important elections of our lives. But it isn't just the White House that's up for grabs. We must think about the Senate too. Make a 5x-matched donation today to show your support for President Trump and his Republican Senate Majority.
Friend,

The 2020 elections will likely be the most important elections of our lives. But it isn't just the White House that Democrats are trying to take.

**Republicans have 23 Senate seats to defend. If we lose just four of them, we lose the Senate and the opportunity to Keep America Great.** President Trump is relying on us to keep his allies in office. It's go time and we need supporters to step up now. [**Make a 5X-matched donation to defend President Trump 's Senate Majority and help them reach their critical End of Month goal.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UcOoUUVbcd9aw7OYBZY-TuvjSrcjDQzo5jzie_5JXk2PEWQxZ9tRzoUb2u-jkg235WZ4GLYPpvbvwMhxIsB3XG_UYCighC9aloBHVpoeY18MWXA8fjIjpt9b9oLUgB9AbxunChmeL2-06AOR5dh499mFktpGgpUHIQCbKm3OACUNPz3h0EY-3_nY4vhW14Lo5K3Y3gK5fe-SQ8Akn7CP8n_3vMwk9ALdJfjbXVd4i0pkhkg2u6uyRJuTDoizI0vnFT4R1Fbhk0tGUdjqU8KYqYQNrbP-Fyrfv8AlmIoYDfCq0lslwvxNLhUBfkvsJyPVNtxqIV3h9Rpt4Jzu_ZWWtCylH2rVTpSsMlX1lMmMXBX9OKAvKecdMnRthC8hJukEIUaSZ1MV1CIuOuoILOLIc5Jkpyw_ucSvEQZ-icVuQkk=&c=SN5xIkZveWFNVLteZf5okW0_2Nz5pkmnYKLq3y-eUvnXUGc4JFOtdw==&ch=u_APe4cLz6Ba1K3B25MjHGKsM4T1Yp01zmOw9boomqogKXsTwhzyKA==)

**We must take action now to prevent a liberal takeover. Make a 5X-matched gift to help Republicans win in 2020.**

name: Corky Messner
subject: I’m matching donations!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Will you help us reach our goal this month? Read more >>
Peter, I’m spending almost every moment of the day fighting hard to defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen in November, but I wanted to take a moment to give you a quick campaign update. To show my commitment to the people of New Hampshire and all Americans, I’ve decided to personally MATCH all contributions during our end-of-month fundraising drive. **But time is running out, we won’t have this opportunity once tomorrow comes**. I’m a businessman, not a career politician, and I will always put people ahead of politics. We need to raise $4,320 before midnight TONIGHT to hit our goal - and don’t forget I’m matching it! Will you chip in what you can to help me defeat D.C. Jeanne? Click here to make a secure online donation now >> **[https://secure.winred.com/messner-for-senate/eom-3-053120](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/50695010e1f94301/60210a46cbc161b4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** With your help, I know we can win! Thanks,

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It's important we come out of the gate strong and show just how powerful this movement still is. Hitting these fundraising milestones also helps set budgets for advertising, organizing, outreach... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525747/45c30650/1c8645b6a/66e9c0df/3570470920/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're more than halfway through the first full quarter of fundraising since Elizabeth announced Warren Democrats and her re-election campaign. And it's important we come out of the gate strong and show just how powerful this movement still is.

Hitting these fundraising milestones also helps set budgets for advertising, organizing, outreach, and more.

**[If you're able to, can you make a contribution of $2 or whatever you can to help our campaign hit this important fundraising goal before tonight's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525747/45c30650/1c8645b6a/66e9c0de/3570470920/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjIyRl9FT01fR09MX0RfMjAyMDA1MzFfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR22F_EOM_GOL_D_20200531_V1S3_P")**

If every single person in Pennsylvania reading this email chips in now, we'll reach today's goal in no time. But we know not everyone will, and we know not everyone is in a place to make a donation right now.

That's why if you're still able to, it would make a powerful impact. (And if you're not, that is okay!)

**[So if you're able to, will you make your first contribution to help hit our fundraising goal before tonight's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525747/45c30650/1c8645b6a/66e9c0de/3570470920/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjIyRl9FT01fR09MX0RfMjAyMDA1MzFfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR22F_EOM_GOL_D_20200531_V1S3_P")**

Peter, **We smashed our end-of-the-month goal — but now this is a " TOSS-UP" race! ** The incumbent Republican Michael McCaul is scared. He sent an email this week pleading with his supporters to donate because he was terrified his seat was a toss-up — well, he’s right. | | What great news, crew! I hope you saw the polling team's email from yesterday. We're now neck and neck with our opponent. The next 48 hours will be make or break. We need to be the most organized, the most dedicated, and the most active campaign to win this primary. **Take a look at our email below,**[_**and consider making a last minute donation to help us make Admiral Mike the Democratic nominee.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f256e/33365068/4a780b2e/3f8bcedf/1366747760/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200531_em_fr_pollkick_all_l1") | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f256e/33365068/4a780b2e/3f8bced8/1366747760/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200531_em_fr_pollkick_all_btn1")
---
Don't forget, absentee ballots have to be postmarked by tomorrow, and please practice safe voting if you're going in person!
Thank you,
Kimberley
Campaign Manager

From: Franken Polling Team
Date: Sat, May 30, 2020
Subject: NEW POLL
[](secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200531_em_fr_pollkick_all_hdr)

All your support is paying off. We just saw a poll that has the Admiral statistically tied for the top spot in this race!
**They tried to stop us. They spent over $8 million. They tried to attack Mike for his military service. They couldn 't.**
The momentum that we've all felt is real, and now we have the numbers to back it up. Iowans are taking notice of our campaign and Mike's vision for Iowa. But we need to keep up the pressure. The next three days are make or break.
[_**We 're $73,000 away from our last fundraising goal of the primary. Can you chip in any amount right now? Every penny goes immediately towards our outreach and advertising efforts. No amount is too small, and every contribution is valuable.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f256e/33365068/4a780b2e/3f8bced9/1366747760/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200531_em_fr_pollkick_all_L2")

My team has just informed me that we’re now only $1,651 away from reaching our goal. We’re officially activating 3X! Rush in your donation by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! We have less than 12 hours left to hit this deadline. I can’t do this without you. Thank you for your support, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/09b10fde73cf/the-nra-koch-and-exxon-have-aon-this-race?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
|
> | | | | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together._
> ---
| | You're getting a lot of these end of month emails, so I won't beat around the bush.

Yesterday my team reached out to you about our crucial fundraising deadline for the month of May. This isn't a ploy. Races like ours, in districts that lean Republican, rely on fundraising totals from May and June to demonstrate the strength of our movement. A big number in May is a signal to potential supporters all over the country -- **and to my opponent **\-- that we are on the right track to win.

**My Republican opponent has already benefited from millions of dollars in outside spending from Koch, the NRA, and Wall Street, and we have to keep up.**

Tonight's deadline is critical and the money we raise is going directly into voter contact -- making sure our message is reaching the people of IL-16. **We have less than 12 hours to raise $3,419.** [Can I count on you to chip in and help us fight back against](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4c3a1bb667&e=140a9b81e7)[ the Republicans and their special interests?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=5e23f19343&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Congresswoman Katie Porter
subject: More work to be done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | I'm working every day to stand up to those who try to take advantage of the American people -- but Republicans are giving me a run for my money. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d045f/72412298/4c7d724a/610560e5/3098139634/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfcG9ydGVyc3BsaXRfbWF5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8yMDA1MzFfUG9ydGVyU3Vycl9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjIwIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_portersplit_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1") I'm working every day to stand up to those who try to take advantage of the American people -- **but Republicans are giving me a run for my money.** Through the administration's botched response to the pandemic, I've managed to secure free testing for every American. In the face of a $500 corporate slush fund with virtually no oversight and no help for working Americans, Democrats were able to secure direct relief and expanded unemployment benefits for those struggling the most. **But we 're staring down an unprecedented crisis that will have long-term effects on those who are already struggling to make ends meet **\-- and if we're going to hold Republicans' feet to the fire to address those effects, _I can 't lose reelection._ Republicans have already set their sights on defeating me -- and I need your help to make sure they don't succeed. [**Will you split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d045f/72412298/4c7d724a/610560e7/3098139634/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfcG9ydGVyc3BsaXRfbWF5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8yMDA1MzFfUG9ydGVyU3Vycl9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjIwIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_portersplit_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+split+a+donation+between+my+cam&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d045f/72412298/4c7d724a/610560e9/3098139634/VEsF/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_portersplit_may?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200531_PorterSurr_U1_X1")

clean_body: | | I'm working every day to stand up to those who try to take advantage of the American people -- but Republicans are giving me a run for my money. "" I'm working every day to stand up to those who try to take advantage of the American people -- but Republicans are giving me a run for my money. Through the administration's botched response to the pandemic, I've managed to secure free testing for every American. In the face of a $500 corporate slush fund with virtually no oversight and no help for working Americans, Democrats were able to secure direct relief and expanded unemployment benefits for those struggling the most. But we 're staring down an unprecedented crisis that will have long-term effects on those who are already struggling to make ends meet \-- and if we're going to hold Republicans' feet to the fire to address those effects, I can 't lose reelection. Republicans have already set their sights on defeating me -- and I need your help to make sure they don't succeed. name: Dr. Chuck Dietzen
subject: Today is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
🕛 We have just hours left to reach our goal... please review & respond now! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/8c866c7b36046f41c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, I wasn’t planning to write you today. But my team just updated me... and we’re so close. We only need to raise $1,215 today to reach our critical end-of-month goal! With JUST HOURS to go, **[will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50 before midnight tonight?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/c61a3ff6ae70096cc3d6b838967d376c/33363)** Every dollar we raise will help us close strong and WIN the Republican primary on Tuesday! [**🕛 Deadline TONIGHT! Donate now >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/2ace4bafd710b6fdc3d6b838967d376c/33363) We have less than 48 hours until the polls open for Election Day. That’s why it’s so important that we reach our fundraising goal today. _Every $5 will help us send text reminders about the primary to another 100 voters._ _Every $10 we raise will help us reach another 100 voters via Facebook._ I believe this race will very likely go down to the wire, Fellow Hoosier. We can’t let up now. **Every vote is going to count...[and you can see the direct impact your support today will make!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/cf88b1f449605134c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** Help me win on Tuesday, so we can move on to the general election. I’m running for the U.S. House to work to fix our healthcare, build our economy back, protect our borders and promote human dignity and life at every stage. I strongly believe this message needs a national platform. We need a proven real-world LEADER in Congress, who is ready to get to work and deliver results on the issues that impact our families and businesses. Let’s work together to put a DOCTOR in the HOUSE. Again, the primary is THIS TUESDAY. Make your vote heard, if you haven’t done so already. And please, **[chip in now to help us reach more voters and get them to the polls!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/8b1587dad13bd972c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** Thank you, in advance, for ANY contribution you’re able to help with. To Victory, Dr. Chuck [**🕛 Deadline TONIGHT! Donate now >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/ef71b0959f780f44c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/ae07937ad3e80d95c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/33b47505f53ba64c/841a02bcc0ab8144c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

| | Hey y'all -- The deadline coming up at midnight tonight is our most important yet, and we've never needed your help more. Any contribution you can make will be matched to make double the impact in our fight to defeat Sen. Cornyn. **[Can I count on you to chip in and help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890004/7f51f7bc/4e2379f9/4ef698ba/1009426433/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200531.2nd__1484__&amount=10")**

Thanks x1,000,000,

MJ
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890004/7f51f7bc/4e2379f9/4ef698ba/1009426433/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200531.2nd__1484__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890004/7f51f7bc/4e2379f9/4ef698b9/1009426433/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1484&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. name: Margaret (personal)
subject: quick:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

I know it’s late, and I reached out earlier, so I’ll keep this short: we have just a few hours left before we close out May. And unfortunately, we stand just $1,762 short of where we need to be. I need your help.

Can you make a contribution today? Use this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16?refcode=em05312020PM&amount=25&recurring=1

Thanks so much for all your support,

Margaret

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. If you'd like to donate, click here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgfl-16-email-april2020-fr-april?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1]

If you’d like to volunteer, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LP80RLz5b0iRAiKf5peK5A2?contactdata=BCiZlh%2F4cbMpAj5Tfegy%2FA9T8o43DqUdrnOA4rLAde4sy%2FY4R68eeAdc1wg97egm]

If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/84f39c40-efa0-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/e6543cf4-89a3-ea11-86e9-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjU0M2NmNC04OWEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUaVlZokyYrTwWUO8LBJYqNslwtVxlnBxQwAhnJq1AA=&id=113801977 .

Sarasota, FL 34277

Dear Friend, To say that I am heartbroken over the death of George Floyd, the civil unrest that has followed, the loss of over 100,000 of our fellow Americans to COVID-19 - with no end in sight - the economic devastation of 40 million unemployed, the divisive and dysfunctional nature of Congress, and the absolute vacuum of leadership from the executive branch, doesn't even begin to describe the complexity of my emotions. But I will tell you one emotion that is growing exponentially - determination. I can understand why millions of people voted for Mr. Trump in 2016 and for his enablers in Congress. I'm not blind to the policy failures of both parties that led to the enormous dissatisfaction and distrust of government. What I can't understand is why anyone, given what has happened to our country in the last three and a half years, would vote to perpetuate the current state of affairs. A friend of mine posted something profound, and possibly prophetic on Facebook: _"2020 will go down in history as the year that broke the United States or healed the United States. The choice is ours."_ I'm determined to choose the latter. I hope you are too. **[Demand Better by pitching in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704159/203406986/-1907457919?refcode=053120_lineFF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODAxZWYyNi05NGEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR_ytSD9jF94wss6g5R518R7P0d2DwHGgWyApVH0LD0=)**. body:
I just wanted to send one last email tonight on behalf of our entire team.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704340/203418614/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.31_MG_b2_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E1MzNiMC05OWEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV1aQ6SnPKJpYMWxkZd8IWm9W6jhlGED__VVFDxPgqs=)
