| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704341/203418615/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E1MzNiMC05OWEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV1aQ6SnPKJpYMWxkZd8IWm9W6jhlGED__VVFDxPgqs=&emci=d6fc7bec-6fa3-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c7a533b0-99a3-ea11-86e9-00155d03b1e8&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Team,

I just wanted to send one last email tonight on behalf of our entire team.

We’re not self-funding a million-dollar campaign or relying on divisive tactics for attention. We’re focused on the issues that matter to people in our district and we’re leading a fight against DC special interests. That’s why Sri has committed to not taking any corporate PAC money, so he can be accountable to you -- not big corporate donors.

I know we can win this election, and if you’re able, all of us at Team Sri would appreciate it if you could donate and help us meet our May fundraising deadline so we can start June with the resources we need to continue building on our momentum.

**Here’s a link for you to make that donation and have it count towards our deadline:**

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704342/203418616/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.31_MG_b2_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E1MzNiMC05OWEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV1aQ6SnPKJpYMWxkZd8IWm9W6jhlGED__VVFDxPgqs=)

I’m grateful to have you on this team.

Thank you,
Matt
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704343/203418617/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.31_MG_b2_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E1MzNiMC05OWEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV1aQ6SnPKJpYMWxkZd8IWm9W6jhlGED__VVFDxPgqs=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704344/203418618/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.31_MG_b2_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2E1MzNiMC05OWEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UV1aQ6SnPKJpYMWxkZd8IWm9W6jhlGED__VVFDxPgqs=)

Florida’s 13th District was Republican for 40 years, and we’re going to make it Republican once again. Charlie Crist’s time in office runs out in 2020! He doesn’t even do the job he was sent there to do, which is **voting**. He voted “by proxy” this week, so that he could stay back and collect his $174,000 taxpayer-funded salary without lifting so much as a finger.

If you’re with me, please consider making a donation of any amount to help us reach our 100 digital donor goal. [**You can click here to donate immediately.**](https://makki.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYiVfdd1qpzfdWTEF9wN4yX0TnJpKjCrzruTy2m-Lt4caHY-Rh7prXPl8zepG6YlPsDQW_Va3eSR9IL2VXa2q9lb9KH9zMlX0Mgmb6GieTMH9&e=da3fb8759f1ee785466d5ec52a54a2bd&utm_source=makki&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may_eom_3_friend&n=7&v=7)

Thank you for your support,

Amanda
Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District
727-735-5921

Amanda Makki for Congress

St. Petersburg, FL 33743

name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: we're grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our team is already buckling down to keep Mark in the Senate, where he's working hard for every Virginian.
|
---
| | Derek,

It's the end of the month, and you're probably getting quite a few end-of-month appeals from causes you care about. I'm going to ask you to consider supporting Mark Warner's re-election campaign, and I'd like to explain why.

First, I want to thank everyone who has made a donation -- this week, this month, this quarter. Thank you for showing your continued support for Mark and for this entire team.

After the Republican primary in June, we'll know who will face Mark in the November general election, and our work will kick into high gear.

**Our team is already buckling down to keep Mark in the Senate, where he 's working hard for _every_ Virginian.** In moments of uncertainty, we need people like Mark, who are willing to roll up their sleeves and work until the job is done. He is fighting to make sure bi-partisan relief packages benefit Main Street over Wall Street, calling on internet service providers to expand access and remove restrictive broadband caps for rural Virginians, and laying the groundwork to make sure that everyone has the ability to safely cast their vote come November.

We haven't been able to have an in-person event in almost three months, and our team is working tirelessly to give folks the opportunity to engage online with virtual town halls and digital organizing opportunities. Our fundraising has understandably slowed down, and we're working hard to make up the difference so we can press forward and spread Mark's message to folks across the Commonwealth.

**We need your help.** I know that many folks in Virginia and around the country are facing hardship right now, but I'm asking that you consider supporting real leadership in Washington if you have the means.

**[Any amount you can give today will help get us closer to meeting our June fundraising goal-- every dollar makes an impact. Will you consider chipping in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d441/53d9897e/548ac003/1c887a6c/4047234959/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-may2020?refcode=20200531_f_2_nd__598__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you so much for your support,

Jenny, Finance Director

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d441/53d9897e/548ac003/1c887a6b/4047234959/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-may2020?refcode=20200531_f_2_nd__598__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d441/53d9897e/548ac003/1c887a6a/4047234959/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The all-out war against the President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NVNYqK4yW7vyB5Ld5GC97NAdlkYWCKOw4K7S7_B8ijCBkeBgUd9ih-_jaYGvSfURik47IErUrkZhoUltMQJuUhJPy5j-l7UvZIFj8KGzLnTg240Mkvl4PDMm3ORMwUuCwzyy-kvzaWzUk4ii-btbMsJem5hc1kAYDRuyiZ881N4=&c=HrdUsTX7bCkuzyI4RrqbmhZU1RDQBboobd-s8ljTfIrWT1QUVpb-bQ==&ch=sNahrvwRd_AkMGgzRl-LynNBMimjSGIAgGtn_Oh-C_6P9rBmueKwxA==)
---
| Patriot,
I am asking for your help. As you are probably aware, the mainstream media and the deep state have been in an all-out war against President Trump since he announced his campaign in 2015.
Thanks to the work of Richard Grenell as our DNI Director, we now know that the Obama Administration unmasked General Michael Flynn. People at the highest level, including President Obama and V.P. Biden, were involved in the spying and unmasking of Trump campaign officials.
---
| | | [STAND UP TO THE DEEP STATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NVNYqK4yW7vyB5Ld5GC97NAdlkYWCKOw4K7S7_B8ijCBkeBgUd9ih-_jaYGvSfURik47IErUrkZhoUltMQJuUhJPy5j-l7UvZIFj8KGzLnTg240Mkvl4PDMm3ORMwUuCwzyy-kvzaWzUk4ii-btbMsJem5hc1kAYDRuyiZ881N4=&c=HrdUsTX7bCkuzyI4RrqbmhZU1RDQBboobd-s8ljTfIrWT1QUVpb-bQ==&ch=sNahrvwRd_AkMGgzRl-LynNBMimjSGIAgGtn_Oh-C_6P9rBmueKwxA==)
---
| We cannot stand by and let career bureaucrats determine our elections. We cannot let the deep state spy on Americans for their political views. This is a disgusting abuse of power, and it's all because of their hatred for President Trump.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NVNYqK4yW7vyB5Ld5GC97NAdlkYWCKOw4K7S7_B8ijCBkeBgUd9ih-_jaYGvSfURik47IErUrkZhoUltMQJuUhJPy5j-l7UvZIFj8KGzLnTg240Mkvl4PDMm3ORMwUuCwzyy-kvzaWzUk4ii-btbMsJem5hc1kAYDRuyiZ881N4=&c=HrdUsTX7bCkuzyI4RrqbmhZU1RDQBboobd-s8ljTfIrWT1QUVpb-bQ==&ch=sNahrvwRd_AkMGgzRl-LynNBMimjSGIAgGtn_Oh-C_6P9rBmueKwxA==)
---
| It's time to fight back and defend the President. Will you chip in and help me take on the Deep State before they try to interfere with the 2020 election?
---
| | | [DEFEND THE PRESIDENT AGAINST THE DEEP STATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NVNYqK4yW7vyB5Ld5GC97NAdlkYWCKOw4K7S7_B8ijCBkeBgUd9ih-_jaYGvSfURik47IErUrkZhoUltMQJuUhJPy5j-l7UvZIFj8KGzLnTg240Mkvl4PDMm3ORMwUuCwzyy-kvzaWzUk4ii-btbMsJem5hc1kAYDRuyiZ881N4=&c=HrdUsTX7bCkuzyI4RrqbmhZU1RDQBboobd-s8ljTfIrWT1QUVpb-bQ==&ch=sNahrvwRd_AkMGgzRl-LynNBMimjSGIAgGtn_Oh-C_6P9rBmueKwxA==)
---
| We the People deserve a free and fair election, not one that is determined by Trump-hating bureaucrats. Chip in now to take back the country from the Deep State.
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NVNYqK4yW7vyB5Ld5GC97NAdlkYWCKOw4K7S7_B8ijCBkeBgUd9ih-_jaYGvSfURik47IErUrkZhoUltMQJuUhJPy5j-l7UvZIFj8KGzLnTg240Mkvl4PDMm3ORMwUuCwzyy-kvzaWzUk4ii-btbMsJem5hc1kAYDRuyiZ881N4=&c=HrdUsTX7bCkuzyI4RrqbmhZU1RDQBboobd-s8ljTfIrWT1QUVpb-bQ==&ch=sNahrvwRd_AkMGgzRl-LynNBMimjSGIAgGtn_Oh-C_6P9rBmueKwxA==)
---
| God bless America,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz

body:
but we’re so close to hitting our end-of-month goal tonight, and we need your help to cross the finish line [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704718/203430920/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmE4YjcwYS05ZmEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nXIt7PTuu_s3ainheKYHbHr3KtDwV7d-v9K7wmhS6o0=)
| | Hey team,

Michael has been fighting for much-needed relief in Washington, pushing for bold solutions to help our country recover from this crisis.

[From his signature Health Force plan to his bipartisan RESTART Act to support the hardest-hit small businesses, Michael’s proposals will help American workers and families stay afloat during this pandemic, and come out stronger on the other side.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17704719/203430921/131244706?refcode=EM_FR_B1_053120_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmE4YjcwYS05ZmEzLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nXIt7PTuu_s3ainheKYHbHr3KtDwV7d-v9K7wmhS6o0=)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b136/18e32a7f/4c56c1c5/7b21b54d/4128527436/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b136/18e32a7f/4c56c1c5/7b21b542/4128527436/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b136/18e32a7f/4c56c1c5/7b21b543/4128527436/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b136/18e32a7f/4c56c1c5/7b21b54f/4128527436/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b136/18e32a7f/4c56c1c5/7b21b540/4128527436/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

Hello

We've made thousands of calls. Put up hundreds of signs. And heard from more Iowans in the past few weeks than ever before about why they want someone like their neighbor in Congress getting the job done.

The momentum we're seeing heading into the final hours is so exciting. Our volunteers are doing an incredible job but we've got to keep pushing!
With only 38 hours left, could you spare just one to call your neighbors?
This election is so close, your help will turbocharge our momentum.
CALL YOUR NEIGHBORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489)

The absentee ballot request period closed last week, but there's still time to make your voice heard. Either turn in your absentee ballot to your county auditor by tomorrow or surrender your absentee ballot at your polling location on Tuesday.

More Iowans are planning to vote than ever before. Be sure to tell your friends, family, and neighbors about our campaign and check how many polling places will be open in your county. In many counties across the district, only one polling place will be open.
Make sure to add the official #TeamBret profile picture frame on Facebook to show your support! Let's show we have the strongest grassroots support in all of Iowa.
UPDATE YOUR PROFILE PICTURE (https://www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?overlay_source_object_id=2639193809732162&selected_overlay_id=669813363855311&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARAdrO0MLBBgZZSudDYCOI6DjIOu_v15YS2e1APtOGQLKamRmAoekyeUuCPB9t-lq-j1Liv2qWTDj5zlKYZxCPLU9hmO2oHJz6JFC0grv360J6w537UmZ6k6GxZ2Wz_mk6-CigjgdJ7p_BSTJ-nug1UzQSxpFcq8B-vyUTOIxOINDB-PwGXBI6TVXZc63X2AB7jlgWEQllGr4dt3Yzr4IpDW4S582SBgBiVEtEMaF6Bn7zLiopEp4hxoW3tpHna0TJz0SdSQ2mapHkdhXAOmCHmz7pURo9LJ841fHcJgw5S6gknQg3CHl87cZINSibAlilj9_0gGem3JyH6oORp3M8oC2HBU&__tn__=HH-R&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489)

Did the catch the closing debates? Since calling for more debates earlier this month in order to inform voters about their choices, we received a flood of requests from debate sponsors. Watch the full KTIV debate (https://ktiv.com/2020/05/27/watch-live-at-7pm-iowas-4th-congressional-district-republican-forum/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489) , WHO 13 debate (https://who13.com/news/politics/iowa-fourth-congressional-district-republican-debate/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489) , KWIT debate (https://www.kwit.org/post/4th-district-candidate-forum-exchange-052720?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489) , and KIWA debate (https://www.facebook.com/kiwaradio/videos/3335973833093478/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489) or check out some highlights from previous debates below. Coming off of consistent strong showings, I'm confident Iowans will make the right choice in this election.
CHIP IN $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these uncertain times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. With just 38 hours to go, can you help us share our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home?
ENDORSEMENT ALERT!
https://www.carrollspaper.com/opinion/average-iowan-richards-right-choice-in-iowa-s-4th-congressional-gop-primary/article_7ddafec6-a127-11ea-a10a-9b6d582f98c0.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489

He supports term limits (10 years in the U.S. House). He’s a self-described conservative whose views are in line with the Republicans of western Iowa. We find him forthright and outgoing, very much that regular guy who is likely thinking what you are thinking. And he knows this part of the state." "Obamacare tried to fix healthcare by 'fixing' insurance. That’s like getting a new transmission when your truck’s out of gas. Insurance premiums skyrocketed because the real problems weren’t addressed. If we want change in our health care system, we can’t ignore the problem and expect different results."
https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-talks-building-momentum-big-money-manipulation-and-covid-bailout-pork-with-kvfds-dodger-daily/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=2e34cac394-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-2e34cac394-25822489

"The rule of law is important to Iowans. We don't want amnesty. We want people to come here legally. We want Congress to get off their butts and fix the things that are wrong with our immigration system. And we absolutely don't want the government taking away our Second Amendment rights."

body:
June isn't the only thing heating up around here. |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=d38ca5a49b&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,

As we enter the sweltering heat of June, it's important to keep our eyes on the prize: **Defeat Cory Booker. Defeat RINO infiltrators.**

[](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=7f4f7dce34&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| [STOP BOOKER AND THE RINOS NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=76e5269191&e=3e017fab0f "STOP BOOKER AND THE RINOS NOW")
---
| _**Your help matters more than you know.**_ Every contribution brings us one step closer to victory, and we cannot afford to let New Jersey fall into the hands of a Democrat — or a [Democrat in disguise](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c765c814b1&e=3e017fab0f).

When we win in July, we're not gonna stop. **Together, we will lead President Trump to another explosive 2020 victory. But that only happens if we reach our End-of-Month fundraising goals.**

The Democrats and RINOs are making their last stand. They know we can beat them. [With your help](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=811cbad7ca&e=3e017fab0f), we will break their stranglehold on New Jersey.

Thank you for fighting with us.

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate

|

| [LET'S KEEP AMERICA GREAT — TOGETHER](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=223fbebdc1&e=3e017fab0f "LET'S KEEP AMERICA GREAT — TOGETHER")

body:
This pandemic may have changed the way we’re campaigning for the moment -- but that doesn’t mean we aren’t working as hard as we can to build a winning grassroots operation for the fall.

|

| | Team, I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails about the end-of-month deadline. That’s because meeting this goal is very important -- and we can’t afford to fall behind. This pandemic may have changed the way we’re campaigning for the moment -- but that doesn’t mean we aren’t working as hard as we can to build a winning grassroots operation for the fall. [**I know we can flip Kansas’ Senate seat in November if we work together. Are you with me, team? Rush in your $5 contribution before the midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17705016/203461725/-1877084089?refcode=em200531pm-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmRmOTVlYy1hZmEzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wct0WPOPacMdI7wncGR5er5zmeoPSnPHSNZstWiFkc=) Recent polls and reports show that this race is a toss-up -- we can absolutely flip this seat and send a voice of reason to the Senate. But we know Kris Kobach and the GOP will be paying close attention to our fundraising results -- so the pressure is on to prove this is truly a competitive race. Right now, we are outraising the Republicans and that’s because of supporters like you. name: Taylor, Team MJ Hegar
subject: we're STILL short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Tonight's midnight deadline is approaching fast, and we can't afford to miss our goal.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698aa/36207913/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I'll keep this quick, Peter -- I'm writing because even after MJ emailed you, **we 're still $1,248 away** from our end-of-month goal!

I've done the math, and if just **3 people from your community** pitch in to this email, it'll be enough to put us over the top.

**[Will you make a donation before tonight's midnight deadline to help us reach this crucial goal and stay on track to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698a8/36207913/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200531.3nd__1489__&amount=10")** **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698a8/36207913/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200531.3nd__1489__&amount=10")** Thanks, Peter.
\--Taylor \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: This is the last email I'll send tonight
> Hey y'all -- The deadline coming up at midnight tonight is our most important yet, and we've never needed your help more. Any contribution you can make will be matched to make double the impact in our fight to defeat Sen. Cornyn. **[Can I count on you to chip in and help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698a8/36207913/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200531.3nd__1489__&amount=10")**
>
> Thanks x1,000,000,
> MJ
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698a8/36207913/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200531.3nd__1489__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698ae/36207913/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1489&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890006/7f51f7bc/4e245fa2/4ef698ac/36207913/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Here's how we'll flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
There is so much on the line in the 2020 election -- and during this pandemic, it's only become more clear how badly we need the real leadership we'll get with a Democratic Senate majority.
New polls show the momentum is with Democrats this November -- but we're only going to win this fight if we double down and support our candidates. And with COVID-19 still making it difficult for them to reach the voters they need to win, your support is more crucial than ever.
**With tonight 's end-of-month deadline approaching, there's no better time to give. We can't afford to let our Democrats fall behind with the stakes this high.**
**[Will you make a $5 contribution now to support MJ Hegar in Texas, John Hickenlooper in Colorado, and Tina Smith in Minnesota and help flip the Senate?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200530-eom-slate?refcode=em200530i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I launched my Sprint to 2020 program because I know a Democratic Senate is within reach. But it's going to take all of us pitching in and doing everything in our power to make it happen.
I'm supporting Democratic candidates in must-win races, like MJ Hegar in Texas and John Hickenlooper in Colorado, who are fighting to flip red seats and build our majority.
I'm also working hard to re-elect our Democratic incumbents, like Tina Smith in Minnesota. I need Tina fighting alongside me in the Senate on issues like access to affordable health care, child care, and more.
**[Are you with me, MJ, John, and Tina in this important fight? Split a $5 contribution right now to join our Sprint to 2020 and help us flip the Senate.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200530-eom-slate?refcode=em200530i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200530-eom-slate?refcode=em200530i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6932e2/22080b68/7b70263a/4602081f/3054293730/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6932e2/22080b68/7b70263a/4602081e/3054293730/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b13a/18e32a7f/4c5b3e72/7b21b579/3498976240/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b13a/18e32a7f/4c5b3e72/7b21b57e/3498976240/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b13a/18e32a7f/4c5b3e72/7b21b57f/3498976240/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b13a/18e32a7f/4c5b3e72/7b21b57b/3498976240/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b13a/18e32a7f/4c5b3e72/7b21b57c/3498976240/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**
